mapper.select: select id, username, password, name, role, avatar, password_version from admin where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password, name, role, avatar, password_version from admin where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, username, password, name, role, avatar, password_version from admin where id = #{id} limit 1 for update
mapper.update:
update admin
name = #{name},
avatar = #{avatar},
username = #{username},
where id = #{id}
update admin set password = #{newPassword}, password_version = password_version + 1 where id = #{id}
